name: Sharqia Governorate (Egypt)

colors.symbolism: the fertile farmland of the Eastern Delta, Sharqia's agricultural identity
the wheat of the Delta and details of the governorate emblem

description: A green field charged in the centre with the yellow emblem of Sharqia Governorate.
history: The flag of Sharqia Governorate displays its emblem in yellow on a green field reflecting the fertile farmland of the Eastern Nile Delta, adopted as part of the system of governorate flags introduced in the 2000s.

features.symbolism: the fertile agricultural land of the Eastern Nile Delta
the emblem of Sharqia, with wheat and other motifs evoking the agricultural produce of the Eastern Nile Delta
